name: The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company
description: The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company is one of the world's largest tire companies. It manufactures and markets tires, rubber-related chemicals, and other rubber products for various applications, including automobiles, trucks, buses, aircraft, motorcycle, farm, and earthmoving equipment. Founded in 1898 and headquartered in Akron, Ohio, Goodyear operates manufacturing facilities worldwide and is recognized globally for its iconic Wingfoot brand and Goodyear Blimp.
